dishes.description_es: Sopa paraguaya tradicional al horno con harina de maíz, cebolla dorada y queso Paraguay. Esponjosa, dorada y compañera infaltable del puchero o el asado.
dishes.description_en: A traditional and delicious dish for everyday meals, made with corn flour, onion, and Paraguay cheese.

recipe.es_path: 02 Recipe Library/traditional/sopa paraguaya/sopa paraguaya.docx
recipe.en_path: 02 Recipe Library/traditional/sopa paraguaya/sopa paraguaya (english).docx

img.alt_en: Sopa Paraguaya from Ogape ready to cook at home

dishes.description_es: Frittata al horno con zucchini tierno, cebolla y mozzarella derretida, servida con salsa de yogur y cilantro fresco. Suave y se adapta a cualquier hora del día.
dishes.description_en: A light and versatile oven-baked omelet with tender zucchini and melted cheese. A pilot-rotation staple — quick, balanced, and adaptable to any meal of the day.

recipe.es_path: 02 Recipe Library/regular/frittata de zucchini/frittata de zucchini.docx

img.alt_es: Frittata de Zucchini de Ogape lista para cocinar en casa
img.alt_en: Zucchini Frittata from Ogape ready to cook at home

dishes.description_es: Guiso tradicional paraguayo, espeso y reconfortante, con maíz blanco (locro), carne vacuna, zapallo y verduras. Versión kit con maíz pre-remojado, lista en 40 minutos sin perder el sabor de olla lenta.
dishes.description_en: A traditional Paraguayan stew — thick, hearty, and comforting — made with white corn (locro), beef, pumpkin, and vegetables. Kit version uses pre-soaked corn to bring the slow-cooked flavor to a 40-minute weeknight meal.
dishes.allergens_display: Ninguno reconocido (verificar etiqueta del caldo si se utiliza).

dishes.description_es: Espaguetis en salsa Alfredo cremosa con manteca, parmesano y crema de leche, coronados con pollo dorado y un toque de nuez moscada. Plato cremoso, suave y siempre infalible.
dishes.description_en: A classic and delicious dish, perfect for everyday meals, made with spaghetti, creamy Alfredo sauce, and chicken breast.
dishes.allergens_display: Lácteos (manteca, queso parmesano, crema de leche)

dishes.description_es: Tilapia en sartén con manteca y jugo de limón, terminada con crema y queso rallado, sobre arroz frito. Sabor cítrico y cremoso, plato de día especial sin complicaciones.
dishes.description_en: A delicious and versatile dish, perfect for everyday or gourmet meals, made with tilapia in lemon sauce and served with fried rice.

dishes.description_es: Chuletas de cerdo doradas en manteca y vino blanco, bañadas en una crema de limón con romero. Aroma cítrico, textura suave y un toque de bistró criollo en casa.
dishes.description_en: A delicious and easy-to-make dish for everyday meals, made with pork chops and a savory lemon cream sauce.

dishes.description_es: Rúcula fresca con tomates asados, mozzarella tierna y nueces, con un toque de azúcar moreno y aceite de oliva. Picante, dulce y con un contraste de texturas.
dishes.description_en: A gourmet salad perfect for everyday meals, featuring fresh arugula, roasted tomatoes, mozzarella, and walnuts, dressed with olive oil, salt, and pepper.

dishes.description_es: Linguini al dente con camarones salteados en aceite de oliva, ajo y salsa de tomate ligeramente dulce. Cena rápida con alma de costa, lista en minutos.
dishes.description_en: A gourmet dish perfect for everyday meals, made with shrimp, a rich tomato sauce, and linguine pasta, ideal for a quick and delicious dinner.

dishes.description_es: Mandioca dorada en sartén con cebolla, chorizos toscanos y queso fundido, ligada con huevo. Crocante, salada y profundamente paraguaya.
dishes.description_en: A delicious and versatile dish, perfect for everyday or gourmet meals, made with mandioca, artisanal sausages, and cheese.

dishes.description_en: A simple and delicious stew for everyday meals, made with beef, rice, and vegetables.

dishes.description_es: Salmón sellado a la sartén sobre hojas verdes y papines tibios, con aceitunas negras y vinagreta de limón. Liviana, fresca y elegante en partes iguales.
dishes.description_en: A fresh and elegant salad combining grilled salmon, tender baby potatoes, mixed greens, and a light lemon-mustard vinaigrette. Perfect as a light dinner or refined lunch.

dishes.description_es: Ravioles de verduras bañados en una cremosa salsa de cuatro quesos: azul, cheddar, mozzarella y parmesano. Cremoso, intenso y reconfortante.
dishes.description_en: A delicious and simple dish for everyday meals, made with vegetable ravioli and a creamy four cheese sauce.

dishes.description_es: Hojaldre crocante con mozzarella, jamón y tomates cherry, terminado con orégano y aceite de oliva. Liviana, dorada y lista para una comida rápida con elegancia.
dishes.description_en: A perfect dish for everyday meals, made with puff pastry, mozzarella cheese, ham, and cherry tomatoes, ideal for a light and delicious meal.

dishes.description_es: Un clásico rioplatense — pechugas de pollo doradas en salsa cremosa de cebollita de verdeo, ajo y vino blanco. Suave, reconfortante y perfecto para un día de semana.
dishes.description_en: A Río de la Plata classic — pan-seared chicken breasts in a creamy sauce of green onions, garlic, and white wine. Mild, rich, and comforting — a perfect weeknight dinner.

dishes.description_en: A simple and delicious stew, perfect for everyday meals, made with beef, fresh vegetables, and eggs.

dishes.description_en: A delicious and simple stew for everyday meals, made with beef, mushrooms, and heavy cream.

dishes.description_es: Chipa guazú tradicional de choclo, queso Paraguay y cebolla, dorada al horno hasta lograr una corteza suave y un interior tierno. Acompañamiento esencial del asado paraguayo.
dishes.description_en: A traditional and delicious dish for everyday meals, made with corn, Paraguay cheese, and onion.

dishes.description_es: Costillar de cerdo cocinado a fuego lento con ajo, pimentón dulce y salsa BBQ ahumada. Carne que se desprende del hueso, glaseado pegajoso y aroma de domingo en familia.
dishes.description_en: A delicious and simple dish for everyday meals or gourmet occasions, made with pork ribs and a flavorful BBQ sauce.

dishes.description_en: A traditional and simple dish for everyday meals, made with cassava starch, corn flour, and pork fat or butter.

dishes.description_es: Frittata al horno con morrones rojos, tomates y cebollas verdes en huevos batidos, perfumada con paprika. Liviana, jugosa y rendidora.
dishes.description_en: A simple Italian-style oven-baked omelet packed with sweet roasted bell peppers and melted cheese — a nourishing, protein-rich option for any meal of the day.
